card.text_raw_chs:
获得{IntangiblePower:diff()}[gold]无实体[/gold]。
在你的回合开始时，失去{WraithFormPower:diff()}点[gold]敏捷[/gold]。

card.text_upgraded_chs:

card.text_raw_eng:
Gain {IntangiblePower:diff()} [gold]Intangible[/gold].
At the start of your turn, lose {WraithFormPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
